cultural_notes.free_notes: Post celebrates culinary multiculturalism and Zád Market's positioning as a global food hub. International flag decoration on traditional flatbread symbolizes cultural fusion. Aligns with Saudi Arabia's opening to international business and cultural exchange. No cultural sensitivities detected.
